test_cases.input_summary: Summarising the debate over whether cities should ban gas stoves in new residential construction
test_cases.notes: Identified four distinct positions beyond simple for/against. Points of agreement were genuinely shared. Underreported angles (rental housing impact, cultural cooking practices) were insightful.

test_cases.input_summary: Summarising the debate over mandatory AI content labelling in journalism
test_cases.notes: Strong nuance on the spectrum of positions. Correctly identified the definitional problem (what counts as AI-generated). Tone was appropriately neutral on a topic where the audience may have strong views.

test_cases.input_summary: Summarising the debate over whether professional sports leagues should allow betting sponsorship
test_cases.notes: Good identification of the athlete welfare and problem gambling dimensions alongside the economic arguments. Points of agreement section was solid. Could have been sharper on the international regulatory comparison.
